core_tests.name: Revision Reality Test
core_tests.question: Is the default actually revised, or merely declared revisable?
core_tests.failure_mode: revisable in principle, inert in practice

core_tests.name: Rollback Reality Test
core_tests.question: Does rollback remain possible while restoration cost is still manageable?

core_tests.name: Exception Re-entry Test
core_tests.question: Can exceptions materially alter the dominant path?
core_tests.failure_mode: exceptions logged but unable to modify the default

core_tests.name: Authority Distribution Test
core_tests.question: Can multiple actors materially alter the default path?
